Afghanistan.notes: Visa isn't required if born in Afghanistan or their parent is a national of Afghanistan or was born in Afghanistan.. e-Visa: Visitors must arrive at Kabul International (KBL)..

Albania.notes: Visa not required for holders of a multiple entry visa issued by the US, if having used the visa to enter the US at least once, for a maximum stay of 90 days. The maximum stay allowed under visa exemptions is granted within 6 months..

Algeria.notes: Tourists to cities in the south of Algeria (Timimoun, Ghardaia, Ilizi, Djanet or Tamanraset) can obtain a visa upon arrival for a maximum of 30 days, but must have a return/onward ticket and a hotel reservation confirmation.

Antigua and Barbuda.stay: Freedom of movement for OECS states; ID card valid.

Armenia.notes: Obtainable on arrival at Zvartnots International Airport or prior to travel online.. May obtain a visa on arrival for a maximum stay of 120 days at a cost of 15,000 AMD. May also obtain an e-Visa in advance.

Australia and territories.notes: May apply online (Online Visitor e600 visa)..

Austria.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.

Azerbaijan.notes: Holding a residence visa issued by the United Arab Emirates may obtain a 30-day tourist visa on arrival in Azerbaijan. They must present their valid visa or residence permit along with their passport.

Bangladesh.notes: Not available at all entry points..

Barbados.notes: Holders of Caricom Certificate of Skills can stay indefinitely..

Belarus.notes: Must arrive and depart via Minsk International Airport..

Belgium.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.

Belize.notes: Holders of Caricom Certificate of Skills can stay indefinitely..

Benin.notes: Must have an international vaccination certificate..

Bhutan.notes: Applicants can independently obtain an e-Visa whose duration of stay is 90 days. Visa fee is 40 USD per person (nonrefundable). Visa application may be processed within 5 business days.. e-Visa applicant is also subject to pay Sustainable Development Fee of 100 USD per day..

Bulgaria.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.

Canada.notes: Visa not required for US permanent resident card Holders..

Cape Verde.notes: Not available at all entry points.. Requirement to register online 5 days before arrival.. Also pay the airport security fee of CVE 3400 either online or on arrival..

China.notes: Visa-free agreement signed with China in effect from 19 Sep 2022..

Colombia.notes: Extendable up to 180-days stay within a one-year period.

Côte d'Ivoire.notes: e-Visa holders must arrive via Port Bouet Airport..

Croatia.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.

Czech Republic.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.

Denmark.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.

Egypt.notes: On-arrival visa costs 25 USD for Single entry visa (Tourism)..

El Salvador.notes: Visa not required for Holders of a valid visa issued by Canada, the USA or a Schengen Member State..

Equatorial Guinea.notes: Must arrive via Malabo International Airport, processing fee 75 USD.

Estonia.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.

Ethiopia.notes: eVisa holders must arrive via Addis Ababa Bole International Airport.

Finland.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.

France.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.

Gabon.notes: Electronic visa holders must arrive via Libreville International Airport..

Germany.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.

Ghana.notes: May transit without a visa or enter without a visa for up to 60 days per entry for business, tourism or family visits.

Greece.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.

Grenada.stay: Freedom of movement for OECS states; ID card valid.

Guatemala.notes: Visa not required for a max. stay of 90 days for holders of a valid visa issued by Canada, the USA or a Schengen Member..

Guyana.notes: Holders of Caricom Certificate of Skills can stay indefinitely..

Honduras.notes: Visa not required for holders of a visa valid for at least 6 months on arrival, issued by Canada, the USA or a Schengen Member State..

Hungary.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.

Iceland.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.

India.notes: e-Visa holders must arrive via 32 designated airports or 5 designated seaports.. An Indian e-Tourist Visa may only be obtained twice within 1 calendar year.. Foreigners of Pakistani origin or who hold a Pakistani Passport are not eligible for an e-Visa. Foreigners who are not Pakistani nationals, but whose parents or grandparents (either paternal or maternal) were born in, or were permanent residents in Pakistan, are also not eligible for an e-Visa..

Iran.notes: Arriving at Kish (KIH) or Qeshm (GSM) do not need a visa for a maximum of 14 days.. Can obtain a visa on arrival at Mashhad International Airport (MHD), Tehran International Airport (IKA), Tabriz International Airport (TBZ), Esfahan International Airport (IFN) and Bandar Abbas International Airport (BND) for a maximum of 30 days.

Italy.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.

Jamaica.notes: Holders of Caricom Certificate of Skills can stay indefinitely..

Japan.notes: Holders of a residence permit in Australia, Brazil, Cambodia, Canada, India, Saudi Arabia, Singapore, South Africa, Taiwan (Province of China), United Arab Emirates, United Kingdom, United States. can apply for a single entry e-visa individually. The duration of stay for these jurisdictions is up to 90 days (unless otherwise noted). e-Visa holder must arrive in Japan by air..

Jordan.notes: Conditions apply.. Not available at all entry points..

South Korea.notes: Korean electronic travel authorization for 2 years..

Kuwait.notes: e-Visa can be obtained for holders of a Residence Permit issued by a GCC member state.

Kyrgyzstan.notes: Electronic visa holders must arrive via Manas International Airport or Osh Airport or through land crossings with China (at Irkeshtam and Torugart ), Kazakhstan (at Ak-jol, Ak-Tilek, Chaldybar, Chon-Kapka ), Tajikistan (at Bor-Dobo, Kulundu, Kyzyl-Bel ) and Uzbekistan (at Dostuk )..

Laos.notes: 18 of the 33 border crossings are only open to regular visa holders.. e-Visa may be used to enter Laos through the Luang Prabang, Pakse and Vientiane international airports, 3 Thai-Lao Friendship Bridges, in Boten (road and railroad ), and in Vientiane (at Khamsavath railway station ).. Visa on arrival is available at the Luang Prabang, Pakse and Vientiane international airports, 4 Thai-Lao Friendship Bridges and 7 border crossings..

Latvia.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.

Lebanon.notes: Holding a residence permit issued by a GCC Member State on which the profession of businessmen, managers, company owners, doctors, engineers and lawyers is stated, can obtain a visa upon arrival at Beirut (BEY) Beirut International Airport..

Liechtenstein.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.

Lithuania.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.

Luxembourg.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.

Malta.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.

Mauritius.notes: 180 days per calendar for tourism, 120 days per calendar for business.

Mexico.notes: Visa not required for holders of a visa issued by Canada, Japan, United States, United Kingdom or a Schengen Member State for a maximum stay of 180 days..

Morocco.notes: May apply for an e-Visa if holding a valid visa or a residency document issued by one of the following countries: Schengen Area, Australia, Canada, Ireland, New Zealand, United Kingdom, United States a residency document issued by Cyprus, Japan, United Arab Emirates..

Nauru.notes: Visa Issuance: Passengers with an entry permit letter (visa letter) issued by Nauru. Applications can be submitted via email before departure.

Netherlands.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.

New Zealand.notes: Holders of an Australian Permanent Resident Visa or Resident Return Visa may be granted a New Zealand Resident Visa on arrival permitting indefinite stay (pursuant to the Trans-Tasman Travel Arrangement ), subject to meeting character requirements and obtaining an Electronic Travel Authority prior to departure..

North Macedonia.notes: Visa not required for holders of a visa issued by Canada or USA. The visa must be valid for at least 5 days beyond the period of intended stay in North Macedonia. Visa exempt for a maximum stay of 15 days..

Norway.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.

Oman.notes: Holders of a GCC state resident permit can get a 28 days visa on arrival that costs 5 Omani Riyals..

Pakistan.notes: Issued free of charge as of August 2024..

Poland.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.

Portugal.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.

Romania.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.

Saint Kitts and Nevis.stay: Freedom of movement for OECS states; ID card valid.

Saint Lucia.stay: Freedom of movement for OECS states; ID card valid.

Saint Vincent and the Grenadines.stay: Freedom of movement for OECS states; ID card valid.

Saudi Arabia.notes: Residents of GCC countries can apply for Saudi e-Visas online and residents of the United States, United Kingdom and European Union may apply for a visa on arrival.

Seychelles.notes: Application submitted up to 30 days before travel.

Slovakia.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.

Slovenia.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.

South Sudan.notes: Obtainable online. Printed visa authorization must be presented at the time of travel.

Spain.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.

Sri Lanka.notes: The standard visitor visa allows a stay of 60 days within any 6-month period.. Visa fees (for Standard visitor visa): SAARC - USD 35. Non SAARC - USD 75.. e-Visa categories will be charged an additional USD 18.50 service fee.. If transiting from any of the Sri Lankan airports, An e-Visa is exempted (2 day transit period)..

Sudan.notes: Can obtain a visa upon arrival if married to a national of Sudan or prove that are of Sudanese origins from the father's side..

Suriname.notes: Holders of Caricom Certificate of Skills can stay indefinitely..

Sweden.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.

Switzerland.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.

Timor-Leste.notes: Not available at all entry points..

Trinidad and Tobago.notes: Holders of Caricom Certificate of Skills can stay indefinitely..

Turkmenistan.notes: Eligible for a visa on arrival for a maximum stay of 10 days if having a letter of invitation issued by a company registered in Turkmenistan and approved by the Foreign Ministry..

Uganda.notes: Determined at the port of entry.. May apply online..

United Arab Emirates.notes: May obtain a visa online through Smart Service.

Vatican City.notes: Open borders but de facto follows Italian visa policy..

Vietnam.notes: Phú Quốc without a visa for up to 30 days..

Yemen.notes: Dominican Citizens of Yemeni origin with a Yemeni identification document or proof of Yemeni origin do not need a visa..

Zambia.stay: 90 days as tourists or 30 days for business
